articles.title: Falmouth man, 74, arrested after police say he led troopers on wrong-way, high-speed chase over Bourne Bridge
articles.description:
Authorities say Armando Deleon led troopers on a 105 mph pursuit over the iconic Cape Cod bridge Thursday before barricading himself in his home.

The post Falmouth man, 74, arrested after police say he led troopers on wrong-way, high-speed chase over Bourne Bridge appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Armando Deleon, 74, led police on a 105 mph chase over Bourne Bridge.
The incident occurred on Thursday, causing significant traffic disruptions in the area.
Deleon's actions raised safety concerns for local residents and travelers on Cape Cod.

articles.title: Trump hails US exceptionalism before veering into darkly political speech
articles.description:
The president's speech capped an Independence Day eve that was otherwise most notable for a brutal heat wave the gripped much of the eastern portion of the country.

The post Trump hails US exceptionalism before veering into darkly political speech appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Trump's speech on July 3 emphasized US exceptionalism amid a brutal heat wave.
The eastern US experienced record-high temperatures, affecting Boston residents' Independence Day plans.
Local officials urged residents to stay hydrated and avoid outdoor activities during the heat.

articles.title: Aroldis Chapman sets relief Ks record, Red Sox rookie Jake Bennett stifles Angels in 5-2 win
articles.description:
The 38-year-old Chapman broke Hoyt Wilhelm's record with his 1,364th career strikeout as a reliever when he fanned Denzer Guzman leading off the ninth. The knuckleballing Wilhelm last pitched in 1972.

The post Aroldis Chapman sets relief Ks record, Red Sox rookie Jake Bennett stifles Angels in 5-2 win appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Aroldis Chapman sets new relief strikeout record with 1,364 Ks on July 4, 2026.
Red Sox rookie Jake Bennett contributes to 5-2 victory against the Angels.
Boston fans celebrate Chapman's historic achievement as the team improves playoff chances.

articles.title: Magical World Cup ride of Vozinha and Cape Verde ends after pushing Messi and Argentina to the brink
articles.description:
“We have dignified Cape Verde as a national team in most parts of the world,” Vozinha said in Portuguese. “Today, we fought on an equal footing against Argentina.”

The post Magical World Cup ride of Vozinha and Cape Verde ends after pushing Messi and Argentina to the brink appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Cape Verde's national team showcased their talent against Argentina in the World Cup.
Goalkeeper Vozinha praised the team's performance, emphasizing their dignity on the world stage.
Boston's Cape Verdean community celebrates the team's achievement, fostering local pride and unity.
